sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n76012" key="ou)ro/galon" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">οὐρό-γᾰλον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">οὖρον</foreign> A) <sense id="n76012.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">urine of</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">γαλῆ</foreign>, Zos.Alch.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.226B.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
